programme.title: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: When unproduced Broadway playwright Skip Donahue (Gene Wilder) and his best friend, out-of-work actor Harry Monroe (Richard Pryor), are both fired from their dead-end jobs, they abandon Broadway and set out in their battered van to find fame and fortune in Hollywood. But the van breaks down on the way, and they're forced to take jobs as dancing woodpeckers in a bank promotion. Their troubles are just beginning, as their feathered costumes are swiped by a pair of hoods who use them in a holdup, and Skip and Harry are soon carted off to prison. There they try to keep their sanity and their lives as they deal with a sadistic warden, a hulking mass-murderer and the inter-prison rodeo, which may provide them with the opportunity to walk away -- but at a considerable sacrifice.

programme.title: Seems Like Old Times
programme.desc: In Neil Simon's SEEMS LIKE OLD TIMES, Chevy Chase is forced to abet some bank robbers, and soon the cops are after him. His ex-wife, Goldie Hawn, is a liberal lawyer married to the local district attorney. When Chase arrives at their home seeking shelter, she takes him in and their passions are rekindled.

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: The comedy Did You Hear About the Morgans? follows a highly successful Manhattan couple, Meryl and Paul Morgan (Sarah Jessica Parker and Hugh Grant), whose almost-perfect lives have only one notable failure: their dissolving marriage. But the turmoil of their romantic lives is nothing compared to what they are about to experience: they witness a murder and become targets of a contract killer.

programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: Did You Hear About The Morgans?
programme.desc: The comedy Did You Hear About the Morgans? follows a highly successful Manhattan couple, Meryl and Paul Morgan (Sarah Jessica Parker and Hugh Grant), whose almost-perfect lives have only one notable failure: their dissolving marriage. But the turmoil of their romantic lives is nothing compared to what they are about to experience: they witness a murder and become targets of a contract killer.

programme.title: RV (2006)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Bewitched (2005)
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Nicole Kidman and wickedly funny Will Ferrell star as actors playing Darrin and Samantha on a remake of the television show "Bewitched" in this cleverly crafty comedy from director NoraEphron.

programme.title: Matilda (1996)
programme.desc: Danny De Vito, Rhea Perlman and Mara Wilson star in this modern fairytale that mixes hilarious humor with a magical message of love.

programme.title: Matilda (1996)
programme.desc: Danny De Vito, Rhea Perlman and Mara Wilson star in this modern fairytale that mixes hilarious humor with a magical message of love.

programme.title: Click
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: Man Of The House (2005)
programme.desc: A hard-edged Texas Ranger is forced to go undercover as an assistant cheerleading coach to protect a group of college cheerleaders after they witness a murder.

programme.title: This Is The End
programme.desc: The end of the world is coming...and it's going to be hilarious.
